claim: This source kit is not an authorization boundary, database, conflict-resolution system, backend, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Public DataTable and Dialog semantics with labelled native editor inputs, explicit alerts, confirmation, status, and recovery controls.
semantics.rolePolicy: Load and mutation failures use alerts, pending mutation state remains cancellable, successful mutation announcements are opt-in, and permission UI never replaces backend authorization.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through query tools, row selection, sort controls, row actions, editor fields, confirmation, and recovery actions in document order.
Submits the editor native form without replacing browser validation or IME composition.
Closes the public editor dialog and restores focus according to its contract.
Toggles public DataTable row selection when bulk actions are enabled.

nonColor: Selection, permissions, mutation, rollback, confirmation, status, loading, offline, empty, and error states use text and native state in addition to green or violet signals.
responsive: Query tools become a vertical sequence at narrow widths, the data table remains horizontally inspectable, logical properties support RTL, and coarse input receives 44 CSS-pixel targets.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize and validate every read and mutation on the backend; UI permissions and optimistic state are presentation only.
Supply abort-aware adapters with transactional, concurrency, versioning, conflict, retry, rollback, retention, audit, privacy, and offline policy.
Localize visible and spoken strings and validate realistic dense data, virtual keyboards, touch, zoom, assistive technology, destructive operations, and recovery.
